color_filter.h(3) Library Functions Manual color_filter.h(3)

NAME

color_filter.h

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct color_filter_def_t
Color filter metadata structure.

Functions


const color_filter_def_t * color_filter_get_metadata (color_filter_t filter)
Get color filter metadata by enum value. color_filter_t color_filter_from_cli_name (const char *cli_name)
Convert color filter CLI name to enum value. void color_filter_calculate_rainbow (float time, uint8_t *r, uint8_t *g, uint8_t *b)
Calculate rainbow color from time (3.5s cycle). char * rainbow_replace_ansi_colors (const char *ansi_string, float time_seconds)
Replace all RGB ANSI codes with rainbow color. int apply_color_filter (uint8_t *pixels, uint32_t width, uint32_t height, uint32_t stride, color_filter_t filter, float time)
Apply color filter to entire image in-place.
